summary_one_line: Winner must construct a well-formed HTTP response that drives the header parser to set stop_reading=TRUE; loser produces garbage that never parses cleanly.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: An input whose payload contains a recognizable protocol literal (e.g. the HTTP/POP3 magic prefix and a 'HTTP/' response token) so Curl_http_readwrite_headers parses a complete header block and sets stop_reading=TRUE at transfer.c:646; the bytes must reproduce structured ASCII protocol tokens at specific offsets rather than random fill.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: All four winner seeds (value_profile_cmplog) carry coherent protocol tokens: a 'pop3' prefix near offset 0x06 and a literal 'HTTP/' run at offset 0x24-0x28 (47 48 54 54 50 = GHTTP/P), giving the parser the well-formed response it needs to declare stop_reading and take the true branch.
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser seeds (value_profile) are dominated by repeated '%' fill bytes and scattered non-token bytes (e.g. seed 2 is '%%%%!%' runs); they lack the concentrated 'HTTP/' literal at 0x24-0x28, so header parsing never completes and stop_reading stays FALSE (false branch, blocked 10/10).
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds I2SRandReplace on top of value_profile: the CMP buffer records the comparisons inside the header parser against the literal protocol tokens, and I2SRandReplace substitutes those exact operand bytes into the input, synthesizing the 'HTTP/' / magic tokens that value_profile's CMP_MAP-gradient-only search cannot assemble.

evidence_trail.claim: The decisive pair is value_profile_cmplog > value_profile with technique delta I2S, winner resolving 8/10 and loser blocked 10/10.
The blocked side is the true branch of if(stop_reading) at transfer.c:646.
stop_reading is set by the header-parsing call Curl_http_readwrite_headers, so taking the true branch requires a parseable header block.
Winner seeds contain a 'pop3' protocol token and an 'HTTP/' response token.
Winner seeds carry a literal 'HTTP/' run at offsets 0x24-0x29.
Loser seeds are dominated by repeated '%' fill bytes lacking protocol tokens.
value_profile_cmplog's mutator set includes I2SRandReplace, which value_profile lacks.
value_profile has no I2SRandReplace and relies only on CMP_MAP distance buckets.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 427 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed 5a3e2f72e926894a` and observed two I2S-floor dash rows (mutation_op = -) at depth 10 and 11 of the ancestor chain, the floor signal for an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find in vpc.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness where value_profile resolves the stop_reading branch at the same rate as value_profile_cmplog once the required 'HTTP/' literal is reachable by CMP_MAP gradient alone (no I2S substitution needed).

weakest_evidence_point: The byte-diff shows winner-concentrated 'HTTP/' bytes but does not directly prove those exact bytes are what Curl_http_readwrite_headers compares against to set stop_reading.
